description: Web API prompt maps to web-api domain schema with correct domain keys
input: Create a PUT endpoint at /api/users/{id} that accepts name and email in the request body, requires Bearer token authentication, validates input with express-validator middleware, and returns the updated user as JSON.

description: Data pipeline prompt maps to data-pipeline domain schema with ETL fields
input: Build a pipeline that ingests clickstream data from Kafka, applies sessionization transform and filters out bot traffic, loads the cleaned data into BigQuery, runs on a 15-minute schedule, and uses a batch size of 50000 with 3 retries on failure.

description: Agent task prompt maps to agent-task domain schema with agent-specific fields
input: Create an agent that performs security vulnerability scanning on our codebase using SAST and DAST tools, maintains findings in persistent memory, outputs a prioritized vulnerability report, and escalates critical findings to the security-review agent with high priority.
